settings.customreview_text: Great flavor! This is a very grape flavor syrup for shaved ice. If you make your own shaved ice at home, this is a great flavor to have on hand. It’s not made from real grapes but does have the correct flavor. The color is a perfect match.

Love this Blue Raspberry Syrup, This is one of the most requested and best flavors of shaved ice. The flavor is spot on, better than torani imho. This shaved ice brings kid in every adult. I am aware it has some high fructose, but this is first time for us in 30 years. Shaved ice came out perfect. Had amazing party: us and kids enjoyed it greatly. Thumbs up. Love it.
